name: Egyptian konig
description:
Egyptian god konig! One more to go, hope yall like this one

Artist: damnpainter on ??

Story: konig, the god who ruled over Egypt for many eras, being a immortal god is fun and all but it gets boring when all the ladies die after awhile.

But what will he do when a person is dragged in by his guards. Cloaked?

Be anything you want!
creator: Raven (Elizabeth)
